case_title: LOI, PAULA LEE vs. YEE, RICHARD FAN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOI, PAULA LEE AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, RICHARD FAN DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-10-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-08-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-20-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-10-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-10-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR NOV-09-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-09-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. HEARING SET FOR DEC-12-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
119305 ORDERED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO BE CONSOLIDATED WITH 119307. (NOT CONSOLIDATED IN SYSTEM - DUE TO NOT HAVING A FILING CODE TO CONSOLIDATE ON COURT'S OWN MOTION)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-30-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AS TO WHY THERE IS NO DISMISSAL ON FILE. IF DISMISSED NO APPEARANCE IS NECESSARY. HEARING SET FOR MAR-15-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-12-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), CONTINUED OSC: COURT MAY DISMISS CASE IF PROOF OF SERVICE IS NOT ON FILE. PLAINTIFF ORDERED PRESENT ON 1/30/96. HEARING SET FOR JAN-30-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
